prompt: Pull the tile title input (the sr-section div with the text input field for editing tile text) out of src/components/SidebarRight.tsx into a TileTitleInput component in src/components/sidebar_right/. It should manage its own local text state.
assertions: TileTitleInput.tsx exports a function named TileTitleInput
TileTitleInput.tsx has internal useState for tileText (not a prop)
TileTitleInput.tsx has useEffect that syncs tileText from selectedTile
TileTitleInput.tsx accepts props: selectedTile, onEditTile, onBeforeTileTextEdit, onLiveTileText, onEndLiveTileText
SidebarRight.tsx renders <TileTitleInput instead of the sr-section div
SidebarRight.tsx no longer declares tileText state or isEditingTextRef
